title: TileFinder
description: A cliengt-side mod for finding nearby tile/block entities in your world. Useful for modpacks with lots of blocks.
body:
TileFinder

A client-side mod to help you find TileEntities around your base. TileEntities are blocks with extra behaviors like chests, machines, multiblocks, etc. I built this for myself to use in modpacks with my friends - I can never find the machines I need. 

 

By default, `\` opens the UI and `O` clears the guidance beam. The beam can be configured in the Forge Mod Options settings.

 

Selection UI Configurable guidance beam

 

Great for modpacks with lots of machines and other TileEntities.
